verses.geez: ወበእንተዝ፡ ዘበዘይመስሎሙ፡ ለአማልክቲሆሙ፡ ተቀሥፉ፡ በጽድቅ፡ እስመ፡ ይደልዎሙ፡ ወበብዙኀን፡ እለ፡ ይትሐወሱ፡ ሕሱማን፡ ተፅዕሩ።

translations.lxx: Therefore by the like were they punished worthily, and by the multitude of beasts tormented.

verses.geez: ወአሠነይከ፡ ሎሙ፡ ለሕዝብከ፡ አንፃረ፡ ፀሮሙ፡ ወወሀብኮሙ፡ ፍርፍርተ፡ መብልዐ፡ ለፍትወቶሙ፡ ወይጥዓሙ፡ ፍትወተ፡ ዘጣዕሙ፡ ነኪር።

translations.lxx: Instead of which punishment, dealing graciously with thine own people, thou preparedst for them meat of a strange taste, even quails to stir up their appetite:

verses.geez: ወእልክቱሰ፡ አመ፡ ፈተዉ፡ መብልዐ፡ ወባሕቱ፡ በእንተ፡ ግብር፡ ዘተፈነወ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ፡ ይትመየጡ፡ ወዘዘልፈ፡ ልማደ፡ መነኑ።

translations.lxx: to the end that they, desiring food, might for the ugly sight of the beasts sent among them lothe even that, which they must needs desire; but these, suffering penury for a short space, might be made partakers of a strange taste.

verses.geez: ወእሉሰ፡ ሶበ፡ ረከቦሙ፡ ዓፀባ፡ ወኃጥኡ፡ ኅዳጠ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ተደለዉ፡ ለመብልዕ፡ ዘነኪር፡ ጣዕሙ።

translations.lxx: For it was requisite, that upon them exercising tyranny should come penury, which they could not avoid: but to these it should only be shewed how their enemies were tormented.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ መፍቅድ፡ ጸውዐ፡ ይብጻሕ፡ ላዕለ፡ እልክቱ፡ ኵነኔ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ምሂክ፡ እስመ፡ ኅዩላን፡ ወእኩያን፡ እሙንቱ፡ ወከመ፡ ይርአዩ፡ እሉ፡ እፎ፡ ባሕቲቶሙ፡ ተፅዕሩ፡ አፅራሪሆሙ።

translations.lxx: For when the horrible fierceness of beasts came upon these, and they perished with the stings of crooked serpents, thy wrath endured not for ever:

verses.geez: ወለእመ፡ መጽኦሙ፡ መዓተ፡ አራዊት፡ ፀዋጋን፡ ወኀልቁ፡ በንስከተ፡ አራዊተ፡ ምድር፡ እኩያን፡ አኮ፡ ለዝሉፉ፡ ዘፀንዐ፡ መዓትከ፡ ዳዕሙ፡ ተሀውኩ፡ ኅዳጠ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ከመ፡ ይትገሠዑ።

translations.lxx: But they were troubled for a small season, that they might be admonished, having a sign of salvation, to put them in remembrance of the commandment of thy law.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ፡ ትእምርት፡ ኮኖሙ፡ መድኃኒተ፡ ያዘክሮሙ፡ ትእዛዛ፡ ሕግከ።

translations.lxx: For he that turned himself toward it was not saved by the thing that he saw, but by thee, that art the Saviour of all.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ዘተመይጠ፡ እምኔሆሙ፡ አኮ፡ ዘድኅነ፡ በዘርእየ፡ አላ፡ በእንቲአከ፡ ድኅነ፡ ኦ፡ መድኃኔ፡ ኵሉ።

translations.lxx: And in this thou madest thine enemies confess, that it is thou who deliverest from all evil:

verses.geez: ወበዝኒ፡ አመከርኮሙ፡ ወአእመንኮሙ፡ ከመ፡ አንተ፡ ውእቱ፡ ዛታድኅን፡ እምኵሉ፡ እኩይ።

translations.lxx: for them the bitings of grasshoppers and flies killed, neither was there found any remedy for their life: for they were worthy to be punished by such.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ለእልክቱ፡ ቀተሎሙ፡ ንስከተ፡ አንበጣ፡ ወጽንጽንያ፡ ወኢተረክበ፡ ፈውስ፡ ለነፍሶሙ፡ እስመ፡ ይደልዎሙ፡ ከመ፡ ትኰንኖሙ፡ በዘከመዝ፡ አምሳል።

translations.lxx: But thy sons not the very teeth of venomous dragons overcame: for thy mercy was by them, and healed them.

verses.geez: ወለውሉድከሰ፡ ሶበ፡ ተአዘዙ፡ ቦሙ፡ ስነነ፡ አክይስት፡ ዘቦቱ፡ ሕምዝ፡ እስመ፡ ምሕረትከ፡ መጽኦሙ፡ ወፈወሶሙ።

translations.lxx: For they were pricked, that they should remember thy words; and were quickly saved, that not falling into deep forgetfulness, they might be continually mindful of thy goodness.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ለተዘክሮ፡ ቃልከ፡ ጥዕሙ፡ ዘንተ፡ ወፍጡነ፡ ሐይዉ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይደቁ፡ ውስተ፡ ርስዓት፡ ዕሙቅ፡ ወከመ፡ ኢይደቁ፡ ውስተ፡ ካልእ፡ ምግባር፡ ወሕማም፡ እምዝክረ፡ ሠናያቲከ።

translations.lxx: For it was neither herb, nor mollifying plaister, that restored them to health: but thy word, O Lord, which healeth all things.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ አኮ፡ ዕፅ፡ ዘይሰትይዎ፡ ወኢሥራይ፡ ዘይቀብዕዎ፡ ዘፈወሶሙ፡ አላ፡ ቃለ፡ ዚአከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ዘኵሎ፡ ይፌውስ።

translations.lxx: For thou hast power of life and death: thou leadest to the gates of hell, and bringest up again.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ለሞት፡ ወለሕይወት፡ ሥልጣን፡ ብከ፡ ወታወርድ፡ ውስተ፡ አናቅጸ፡ ሲኦል፡ ወታወፅእ።

translations.lxx: A man indeed killeth through his malice: and the spirit, when it is gone forth, returneth not; neither the soul received up cometh again.

verses.geez: ወሰብእሰ፡ ይቀትል፡ በእኩይ፡ ወእምከመ፡ ወፅአ፡ መንፈስ፡ ኢይገብእ፡ ወኢትሠወጥ፡ ነፍስ፡ እንተ፡ ተነሥአት።

translations.lxx: But it is not possible to escape thine hand.

verses.geez: ወእምእደ፡ ዚአከሰ፡ ጐይይ፡ ኢይትከሀል፡ ወኢይደሉ።

translations.lxx: For the ungodly, that denied to know thee, were scourged by the strength of thine arm: with strange rains, hails, and showers, were they persecuted, that they could not avoid, and through fire were they consumed.

verses.geez: ወሶበ፡ አእመርከ፡ ከመ፡ ረሲዓን፡ ይክሕዱከ፡ በኃይለ፡ መዝራዕትከ፡ ተቀሥፉ፡ ወኃልቁ።

translations.lxx: For, which is most to be wondered at, the fire had more force in the water, that quencheth all things: for the world fighteth for the righteous.

verses.geez: ወተሰዱ፡ በዝናም፡ ነኪር፡ ወበበረድ፡ ወበአስራበ፡ ሰማይ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ምሕረት፡ ወኢክልአት፡ ወኃልቁ፡ በእሳት።

translations.lxx: For sometime the flame was mitigated, that it might not burn up the beasts that were sent against the ungodly; but themselves might see and perceive that they were persecuted with the judgment of God.

verses.geez: ወዘመንከርሰ፡ ግብር፡ ዘኢይትከሀል፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይጠፍእ፡ በማይ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ተገብረ፡ ወተሠልጠ፡ ውስቴቱ፡ እሳት፡ እስመ፡ ዓለም፡ መርድእ፡ ለጻድቃን፡ ውእቱ።

translations.lxx: And at another time it burneth even in the midst of water above the power of fire, that it might destroy the fruits of an unjust land.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ላህበ፡ ነድ፡ ኮነ፡ ልሙደ፡ ከመ፡ ኢያውዒ፡ እንስሳ፡ ዘተፈነወ፡ ላዕለ፡ ረሲዓን።

translations.lxx: Instead whereof thou feddest thine own people with angels' food, and didst send them from heaven bread prepared without their labour, able to content every man's delight, and agreeing to every taste.

verses.geez: ወባሕቱ፡ ሶበ፡ ርእዩ፡ ዘንተ፡ እሙንቱ፡ የአምሩ፡ ከመ፡ በኵነኔ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ይሰደዱ፡ ወቦሙ፡ ማእከለ፡ ማይ፡ ይነድድ፡ ኃይለ፡ እሳት፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ከመ፡ ያማስን፡ ወያጥፍእ፡ ፍሬያተ፡ ምድር፡ ዓማፂት።

translations.lxx: For thy sustenance declared thy sweetness unto thy children, and serving to the appetite of the eater, tempered itself to every man's liking.

verses.geez: ወበህየንቴሁ፡ አብላዕከ፡ ለሕዝብከ፡ መብልዐ፡ መላእክት፡ ወፈነውከ፡ ኅብስተ፡ ድልወ፡ እምሰማይ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ፃማ፡ ዘይትኄየል፡ ጣዕሙ፡ እምኵሉ፡ ዘይጥዕም፡ ወያኃሥር፡ ኵሎ፡ ጣዕመ።

translations.lxx: But snow and ice endured the fire, and melted not, that they might know that fire burning in the hail, and sparkling in the rain, did destroy the fruits of the enemies.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ አርአያ፡ መልክዕከ፡ ዘላዕሉ፡ ከሠተ፡ ጣዕመ፡ ምዕርዕርናከ፡ ለውሉድከ፡ ወይትፋለስ፡ ጣዕሙ፡ ለዘይነሥእ፡ እምኔሁ፡ ወይትለአከ፡ ለፈጽሞ፡ ፍትዎቶሙ፡ ዘሐለዩ፡ እምነ፡ መባልዕት፡ ወፈቀዱ።

translations.lxx: But this again did even forget his own strength, that the righteous might be nourished.

verses.geez: በረድኒ፡ ወአስሐትጸንዑ፡ ወቆሙ፡ ዘምስለ፡ እሳት፡ ወኢተመስዉ፡ ከመ፡ ያእምሩ፡ ከመ፡ ፍሬያተ፡ አዝርእቶሙ፡ ለአፅራር፡ አማሰት፡ ወአጥፍአት፡ እሳት፡ እንዘ፡ ትነድድ፡ ውስተ፡ በረድ፡ ወውስተ፡ ዝናማትኒ፡ እንዘ፡ ትበርቅ።

translations.lxx: For the creature that serveth thee, who art the Maker, increaseth his strength against the unrighteous for their punishment, and abateth his strength for the benefit of such as put their trust in thee.

verses.geez: ወዘንተ፡ ካዕበ፡ ሶበ፡ ተሴሰዩ፡ ጻድቃን፡ ኃይለ፡ ሲሳየ፡ ርእሶሙ፡ ረስዑ፡ እስመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፍጥረት፡ ለከ፡ ይትለአክ።

translations.lxx: Therefore even then was it altered into all fashions, and was obedient to thy grace, that nourisheth all things, according to the desire of them that had need:

verses.geez: ኦ፡ ገባሪ፡ ትሰፍሕ፡ ኵነኔ፡ ዘይትፌኖ፡ ላዕለ፡ ዓማፅያን፡ ወትጼጉ፡ ተድላ፡ ይብጻሕ፡ ኀበ፡ እለ፡ ይትአመኑ፡ ብከ።

translations.lxx: that thy children, O Lord, whom thou lovest, might know, that it is not the growing of fruits that nourisheth man: but that it is thy word, which preserveth them that put their trust in thee.

verses.geez: ወበእንተዝ፡ አሜሃ፡ ሀብትከ፡ ሀለወት፡ ትትፋለስ፡ ውስተ፡ ኵሉ፡ ግብር፡ ወትትለአከ፡ ውስተ፡ ኵሉ፡ መብልዕ፡ መንገለ፡ መፍቅድ፡ ዘሰአሉ፡ ወፈተዉ።

translations.lxx: For that which was not destroyed of the fire, being warmed with a little sunbeam, soon melted away:

verses.geez: ከመ፡ ያእምሩ፡ ውሉድከ፡ እለ፡ አፍቀርኮሙ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ከመ፡ አኮ፡ ዘዘዚአሁ፡ ፍሬያተ፡ ዘርእ፡ ዘይሴሴ፡ ሰብእ፡ አላ፡ ቃልከ፡ የዓቅቦሙ፡ ለእለ፡ ይትዌከሉ፡ ብከ።

translations.lxx: that it might be known, that we must prevent the sun to give thee thanks, and at the dayspring pray unto thee.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ዘኢያማስኖ፡ እሳት፡ በከ፡ በንስቲት፡ ላህበ፡ ፀሐይ፡ መዊቆ፡ ተመስወ፡ ከመ፡ ይትአመር።

translations.lxx: For the hope of the unthankful shall melt away as the winter's hoar frost, and shall run away as unprofitable water.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ፀሐይኒ፡ የኃሥሥ፡ ይምጻእ፡ ኀቤነ፡ ከመ፡ ኪያከ፡ ናእኵት፡ ወናስተብቊዕ፡ ኀቤከ፡ መንገለ፡ ሠርቀ፡ ፀሐይ።
እስመ፡ ተስፋሁ፡ ለዘኢየአኵት፡ ይትመሰው፡ ከመ፡ አስሐትያ፡ ክረምት፡ ወይውኅዝ፡ ከመ፡ ማይ፡ ርኩስ፡ ዘኢይበቊዕ።
